name: Ga Xao Xa Ot
recipeInstructions:
(Thai Chicken in Lemon Grass and Chile)
1. Rinse the chicken and dry it well. Cut into small pieces.
2. Peel the garlic and slice finely. Cut the onion into halves lengthwise, then cut each half into ½ inch strips.
3. Heat oil in a large frying pan over medium heat. Add a pinch of salt, garlic, and onion. Fry until the onion becomes translucent. Add lemon grass and chili. Fry for 1 to 2 minutes until fragrant.
4. Add the chicken and cook until lightly browned. Add fish sauce, granulated sugar, and caramel sauce. Mix well.
5. Add 1 cup water and simmer for 45 minutes or until the chicken is tender. Stir occasionally and add more water if necessary.
6. Makes 4 servings.
Caramel Sauce:
1. In a heavy saucepan, mix together ½ cup sugar and 4 tablespoons water.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat and let boil until the mixture changes color.
3. Turn down the heat to low and continue heating until the mixture is brown.
4. Add another ½ cup of water to the mixture. Stir until the sugar is dissolved.
5. Remove from heat and store in a jar in the refrigerator.
